top_findings.summary: The skill documentation (references/implementation.md) instructs loading API credentials from a sensitive file ({baseDir}/config/crypto-apis.env) and setting up exchange API connections, which are unnecessary for the stated primary purpose of monitoring cross-chain bridges using public APIs. The skill is described as read-only with "Public API endpoints only" (ARD.md) and excludes private monitoring (non-goals in PRD.md), making requests for private credentials and exchange data excessive and unrelated to bridge monitoring. Additionally, the mention of exchange APIs is irrelevant to bridge-focused functionality.
